domain: Garifuna parranda music (Belize/Honduras Garifuna people; primero high-pitch lead drum + segundo bass timing-keeper; call-response polyrhythm 2-3 pattern; West-African + Carib fused music)
specific_mechanism: Two-agent LLM ensemble with explicit role separation: AGENT-SEGUNDO emits a fixed-rate timing-anchor token stream (every K=8 tokens emit [ANCHOR_T], where T = anchor index) at LOW improvisation budget (deterministic); AGENT-PRIMERO generates free-form response conditioned on the anchor stream as polyrhythm-phase reference (every K_p≠K tokens cycles through a polyrhythm 2:3 schedule of anchor consumption). Both agents share input context + write to shared sequence; final output = Primero's stream with anchor tokens stripped post-hoc.
llm_application: PARRANDA-PRIMERO: a 2-agent LLM ensemble with primero-improviser + segundo-timer roles + shared polyrhythmic anchor stream. (1) AGENT-SEGUNDO: deterministic anchor-token emitter — every K=8 tokens output [ANCHOR_T] with T monotonic; (2) AGENT-PRIMERO: free-form generation conditioned on segundo's anchor stream as positional phase reference; every K_p tokens (K_p coprime to K) consumes the latest anchor for cross-rhythm awareness; (3) Both agents read same prompt input; output = primero stream with anchor-tokens stripped; (4) Polyrhythm 2:3 = (K, K_p) = (8, 12) cycle. Differs from AgentsNet 2507.08616 (scale-up 100 agents collaboration, not 2-agent timing-anchor), LLM-Coordination NAACL 2025 (eval/analysis, not architecture), Communication-Centric Survey (survey), Multi-Agent Collab Survey 2501.06322 (taxonomy + Stackelberg leader-follower no explicit polyrhythm anchor stream). Differs from R392 MAASAI-ILPAYIANI (elder consensus general), R411 IROQUOIS-CONDOLENCE (state-recovery atomic-coordination), R443 KOGI-MAMA-COUNCIL (per-hazard specialist forecast) by EXPLICIT 2-AGENT POLYRHYTHMIC ANCHOR-STREAM mechanism.
novelty_claim: AgentsNet + LLM-Coordination + Stackelberg leader-follower + Multi-Agent Collab cover leader-follower MAS space. PARRANDA-PRIMERO adds (a) 2-agent primero-segundo role separation + (b) explicit polyrhythmic anchor-stream phase reference + (c) coprime K/K_p cycling. Recombination.
